_comment: Config-driven Copy Activity source/sink field definitions. Field keys prefixed with 'src_' (source) or 'snk_' (sink) to avoid naming collisions when both sides are flattened onto the same activity object. jsonPath is relative to the source or sink object. Fields without a jsonPath are UI-only controls (e.g. filePathType, useQuery) used to drive conditional display.

snk_blockSizeInMB.label: Block size in MB
snk_blockSizeInMB.rangeError: Block size value must be a number in 4-100.
